To truly benefit from AI agents at scale, companies must redesign their entire workflow to capture the promised gains in productivity and value.
In this article, Nitin Anand, our hi-tech and professional services leader breaks down the strategies for scaling AI with the right data foundation, operating model and governance frameworks that treat intelligence as a managed asset.
